title: Tourism 2.0 in La Rioja
body:
[![Bodegas Campo Viejo, Logroño, La Rioja](http://www.xarop.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/12/larioja20-650x250.jpg "larioja20")](http://www.xarop.com/dev/wp-content/uploads/2010/12/larioja20.jpg "Bodegas Campo Viejo, Logroño, La Rioja") Tourism is one of the sectors where *[Social Media](http://www.xarop.com/blog/social-media/)* and *Internet 2.0* in general offers great information and promotion support. Visiting a place, contemplating its passages, its monuments, breathing its aromas and tasting its gastronomy involves the use of all the senses of the human being and all this remains in our memories forever and is and will be irreplaceable by any [technology](http://www.xarop.com/blog/tecnologia/) no matter how advanced it may be. I recently had the opportunity to spend a couple of days in Rioja with [colleagues from the sector](http://www.socialtec.es "Socialtec: Group of companies that develop projects under a model of collaboration and co-development in the field of social technologies"), and the main conclusion I came up with is that I have to return because I lacked time to enjoy everything that is offered for [tourism in La Rioja](http://lariojaturismo.com "La Rioja Tourism Portal"). [![R. Lopez de Heredia](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5122/5269680866_85296418aa_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5122/5269680866_85296418aa_z.jpg "R. Lopez de Heredia") [![R. Lopez de Heredia](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5286/5269072595_de23ac9062_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5286/5269072595_de23ac9062_z.jpg "R. Lopez de Heredia") [![R. Lopez de Heredia](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5044/5269074219_dec02ac376_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5044/5269074219_dec02ac376_z.jpg "R. Lopez de Heredia") [![R. Lopez de Heredia](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5283/5269075591_d7f7536e99_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5283/5269075591_d7f7536e99_z.jpg "R. Lopez de Heredia") [![R. Lopez de Heredia](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5088/5269077089_c471074d48_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5088/5269077089_c471074d48_z.jpg "R. Lopez de Heredia") [![R. Lopez de Heredia](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5281/5269689008_4660c8c102_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5281/5269689008_4660c8c102_z.jpg "R. Lopez de Heredia")

We start with a visit to the [Bodega Lopez Heredia](http://www.lopezdeheredia.com/ "Bodegas R. López de Heredia, Viña Tondonia"), where they teach you the importance of tradition in the production of wines, from start to finish in century-old wooden vats and barrels. Right there they offered us a meal based on local products with their corresponding pairing, priceless!

[![Casa Rural Mirador de Moncalvillo, Daroca de Rioja](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5287/5269084387_d0b90fca31_z.jpg)](http://www.miradormoncalvillo.com/ "www.miradormoncalvillo.com")

We stayed at the [Casa Rural Mirador de Moncalvillo](http://www.miradormoncalvillo.com/ "Mirador Moncalvillo, Casa Rural"), an unbeatable observatory to rest and plan visits to the area.

We had dinner in the same town, [Daroca de Rioja](http://www.darocaderioja.org/), in a small, young, family-run restaurant where the cuisine of the area is treated with a new style respecting the flavors and tradition, the [Venta de Moncalvillo](http://www.ventamoncalvillo.com/ "Restaurante Venta Moncalvillo - Daroca de Rioja"), which has just been awarded a well-deserved Michelin Star. [![Old Field](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5289/5269088391_b9584a1e64_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5289/5269088391_b9584a1e64_z.jpg "Old Field") [![Old Field] Old](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5041/5269089695_33c2e8b160_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5041/5269089695_33c2e8b160_z.jpg "Old Field") [![Field Old] Old](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5129/5269094023_37910763d3_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5129/5269094023_37910763d3_z.jpg "Old Field") [![Field Old] Old](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5010/5269705310_c4a785f94c_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5010/5269705310_c4a785f94c_z.jpg "Old Field") [![Field Old] Old](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5047/5269097277_c0fd10064d_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5047/5269097277_c0fd10064d_z.jpg "Old Field") [![Field Old] Viejo](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5082/5269100033_e24240dfcd_s.jpg)](http://farm6.static.flickr.com/5082/5269100033_e24240dfcd_z.jpg "Campo Viejo")

The next morning we spent visiting the [Bodegas Campo Viejo](http://www.campoviejo.com/home.php) in Logroño, modern and very spectacular facilities, where they make several of the most recognized wines of La Rioja.

You can consult more details about this experience in the [*travelblog* of La Rioja](http://www.travbuddy.com/travel-blogs/3141/Haro-Spain-3) by Tirso Maldonado and in the [YouTube channel](http://www.youtube.com/turismoenlarioja "Vídeos de Turismo en la Rioja") by Jimmy Pons.
